bounty.name: Reddit Mod Tools and Migrated Apps Hackathon

runtime.reason: The bounty requires Reddit Developer Platform / Devvit. This overrides the generic Cloudflare-first default.

ai.safety: AI produces a briefing only; destructive Reddit actions require moderator confirmation.

required_env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
required_env.required_for: Live incident briefing after a moderator declares an incident
required_env.storage: Devvit global secret setting openai_api_key or local .env for smoke tests

required_env.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
required_env.storage: Devvit global setting openai_base_url or local .env

required_env.name: OPENAI_DEFAULT_MODEL
required_env.storage: Devvit global setting openai_model or local .env

real_data_sources.evidence: onPostSubmit, onCommentSubmit, onPostReport, onCommentReport, and onModAction are wired to server routes.
Open Incident Room creates/opens the custom post; Send to Incident Room adds evidence.
store.ts serializes RoomState with evidence, timeline, claims, action packs, and metrics.
scripts/smoke-ai.mjs validates a live provider response when OPENAI_API_KEY is present.

cloudflare.reason: This hackathon requires a Devvit app listing, not a standalone web deployment.
